expiredEvents.title: Developing: PCMC to issue notice to contractor, environment dept over Moshi tragedy
expiredEvents.summary: The directions were issued by PCMC commissioner Dr Vijay Suryawanshi during a review meeting on Sunday after the 84-hour rescue operation concluded with the recovery of the ninth victim
expiredEvents.impact: Emergency access and local movement may be restricted while rescue work continues.
expiredEvents.recommendedAction: Keep clear of the site and do not obstruct emergency vehicles.
